data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Family/household add-ons', but the evidence provided does not confirm this requirement. The linked use case outlines various membership models but does not mention any family or household add-on options, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage. Specifically, the evidence does not support the existence or functionality of family/household add-ons, which are essential to satisfy the requirement.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
